CustomField.formula:
"[ref:!" & LEFT($Organization.Id,6) & SUBSTITUTE(RIGHT($Organization.Id,10), "0", "" )& ".!" & LEFT(Id,6) & SUBSTITUTE(Left(RIGHT(Id,10), 5), "0", "") & RIGHT(Id,5) & ":ref]"
/* "[ref:_" & LEFT($Organization.Id,5) & RIGHT($Organization.Id,4) & "._" & LEFT(Id,5) & SUBSTITUTE(Left(RIGHT(Id,10), 5), "0", "") & RIGHT(Id,5) & ":ref]" */
CustomField.label: Case Ref ID PKI
